sections.paragraph:
αὐλή, ῆς, ἡ [cp. Homeric ἰαύω ‘rest, pass the night’]

—1. ‘an enclosed open space’, courtyard Mt 26:58, 69 and par.; court (of the temple) Rv 11:2; fold (for sheep) J 10:1, 16.

—2. ‘dwelling complex’ (consisting of a courtyard and associated structures) house/farm Lk 11:21;palace Mt 26:3.
